intro: Software Developer with enterprise and research experience across the full SDLC — analysis, design, implementation, testing, deployment and post-launch support.
description: At the University of Adelaide's CREST, I've delivered 4–5 production apps and APIs serving researchers, data scientists and operational staff. Earlier at ANZ New Zealand, my Java/Spring Boot microservices replaced manual workflows and contributed to a verified ~10% improvement in disaster-recovery exercise efficiency — recognised with the Kau Mau Te Wehi Award. I ship reliable systems in high-stakes operational environments and communicate clearly across technical and non-technical stakeholders.

doing.title: Web & Full-Stack
doing.text: Production apps and REST APIs with React, Next.js, Node.js and FastAPI.

doing.title: Mobile
doing.text: Cross-platform apps with React Native / Expo.

doing.title: AI & RAG
doing.text: LLM integration, data pipelines, fine-tuning over vector + graph stores.

doing.title: Platform & CI/CD
doing.text: Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, OpenStack, GitHub Actions.
